footer.description: Unified Digital Addressing and Emergency Management • Connecting Citizens, Services, and Safety

platform.connectEGDescription: Unified platform for digital addressing and emergency management in Equatorial Guinea.
platform.connectingCitizensServices: Connecting citizens, addresses, and emergency services
platform.innovativeTechnology: through innovative technology and seamless integration.
platform.twoIntegratedSystems: Two integrated systems working together to provide comprehensive solutions
platform.advancedRoleManagement: Advanced role management for secure, granular permissions.
platform.automatedDocumentGeneration: Automated document generation with QR codes.
platform.digitalDocumentationDescription: Comprehensive digital documentation with evidence management, incident reports, and automated UAC generation for streamlined operations.
platform.transformingEquatorialGuinea: Transforming Equatorial Guinea through digital addressing and rapid emergency response.
platform.establishComprehensiveAddressing: Establish a comprehensive national digital addressing system integrated with emergency services.
platform.modernizeEmergencyResponse: Modernize emergency response with coordinated police and services.
platform.provideDirectAccess: Provide citizens with direct access to address services and emergency alerts.
platform.smartUrbanPlanningDesc: Enable data-driven planning using accurate address and incident data.
platform.dataExcellenceDesc: Promote data quality, interoperability, and secure access across agencies.
platform.aboutConnectEG: ConEG is the national platform for unified digital addressing and emergency management.
platform.missionDescription: To connect citizens, addresses, and emergency services through reliable technology.
platform.visionDescription: A safer, smarter nation empowered by trusted address data and rapid response.
platform.findAnswersQuestions: Find answers to common questions and learn how to use the platform.
platform.systemManualDescription: Download the complete system manual as a PDF document. This comprehensive guide covers both the Address Registry and Police Operations modules, including all user roles, workflows, features, and administrative guidelines.
platform.emergencyAlertDescription: Citizens can send emergency alerts directly to police and emergency services. The system includes GPS location sharing and real-time communication.
platform.incidentManagementDescription: Police and emergency operators manage incidents through real-time dashboards, unit dispatch, and status tracking.
platform.unitCoordinationDescription: Emergency units can communicate, request backup, and coordinate response efforts through integrated communication tools.
platform.emergencyOperatorsDescription: Receive and process emergency alerts, dispatch units, and monitor incident status.
platform.dispatchersDescription: Coordinate unit assignments and manage real-time communication between operators and field units.
platform.supervisorsDescription: Oversee operations, assign operators to incidents, and ensure proper response protocols.
platform.fieldUnitsDescription: Respond to incidents, update status in real-time, and communicate with dispatch for coordination.
platform.realtimeAnalyticsDescription: Real-time analytics across both address registry and police operations with performance tracking, response metrics, and data-driven insights.

help.verificationTimeQuestion: How long does address verification take?
help.verificationTimeAnswer: Address verification typically takes 3-5 business days. Field agents need to visit the location for verification before registrars can approve the address.
help.trackSubmissionQuestion: Can I track my address submission?
help.trackSubmissionAnswer: Yes, you can track the status of your submission in your dashboard. You'll receive notifications for status updates.
help.rejectedAddressQuestion: What if my address is rejected?
help.rejectedAddressAnswer: If your address is rejected, you'll receive feedback explaining the reason. You can resubmit with corrected information.
help.officeSchedule:
Monday - Friday: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM
Saturday: 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM
help.userManualDescription: Comprehensive guide for using both Address Registry and Emergency Management systems.
help.accountRegistrationDescription: Create an account using your email address and a secure password. Verify your email to activate your account.
help.profileSetupDescription: Complete your profile with accurate personal information. This helps us verify your identity for address submissions.
help.step1Description: Select the correct province and city, then provide street and building details.
help.step2Description: Use the "Get Current Location" button or manually enter GPS coordinates. Accurate coordinates are essential for verification.
help.step3Description: Upload a clear photo of the location and provide any additional description that helps identify the address.
help.step4Description: Submit your request for review. Field agents will verify the location and registrars will approve the final address code.
help.citizensDescription: Can search for addresses, submit new address requests, and view their submissions.
help.fieldAgentsDescription: Verify address locations on-site and approve or reject submissions based on field visits.
help.verifiersDescription: Review field agent reports and conduct additional verification if needed.
help.registrarsDescription: Generate official UAC codes and publish verified addresses to the national registry.

pleaseLogInToEditProfile: Please log in to edit your profile
updatePersonalInformation: Update your personal information and contact details
updateAccountPassword: Update your account password for security

fieldDashboard.incidentDetailsDescription: View and manage incident information, status updates, and field actions.
fieldDashboard.noUnitAssignmentDescription: You are not currently assigned to any emergency unit. Please contact your supervisor.

manageDigitalAddresses: Manage digital addresses, UACs, and location data
searchSubmitVerifyManage: Search, submit, verify, and manage digital addresses

qrCodeContainsInfo: • The QR code contains the UAC, coordinates, and address information for easy sharing
clickGetDirections: • Click "Get Directions" to navigate from your current location or another address
useViewOnMapButton: • Use "View on Map" button in the address card to open in your device's default map application
coordinatesProvidedPrecision: • Coordinates are provided with high precision for navigation
hoverForUACClickForDetails: Hover for UAC • Click for details
failedToLoadGoogleMaps: Failed to load Google Maps. Please refresh the page.
directionsFromUACComingSoon: Directions from UAC will be available in a future update

auth.signInDescription: Sign in to submit address requests, track your submissions, and access the registry.
auth.registrationIntro: Don't have an account yet? The registration process is quick and secure.
